primitives.Primitives: Irreducible building blocks of system logic/data
primitives.Composable: Ability to combine discrete parts into new functionality
primitives.Decomposable: Ability to break complex systems into atomic parts
primitives.Index: Searchable registry of identifiers and locations
primitives.Library: Collection of reusable assets and logic modules
primitives.Logical: Consistent with established rules and structure
primitives.Runtime: Active execution state of a component
primitives.Embedded: Integrated natively into a host environment
primitives.Project: The aggregate sum of TNF files and state
primitives.Personal: Data scoped to a specific user or instance
primitives.Define: To establish immutable identity and rules
primitives.Encyclopedia: The cross-referenced sum of system knowledge

behaviors.Agentic: Autonomy to reason, plan, and pursue goals
behaviors.Assimilation: Converting external code to internal standards
behaviors.Mimic: Replicating existing workspace patterns and styles
behaviors.Emergence: Complex behaviors arising from node interaction
behaviors.Fractal: Consistent logic patterns at every scale
behaviors.Telemetry: Real-time auditing stream of agent reasoning
behaviors.Provenance: Documented lineage and history of logic changes
behaviors.Entropy: System decay reversed by autonomous loops

protocols.SGP: Secure Gateway Protocol for Node/Gateway integrity
protocols.TWIP: Web Interoperability Protocol for cross-platform sync
